subject: [RFC PATCH 33/40] PM: hibernate: walk per-superpageblock free lists in mark_free_pages

reviews.author: Rafael J. Wysocki
reviews.summary: Suggested breaking down the code into a separate function to improve readability and maintainability, and provided an example of how this could be done.

2026-05-20.patch_summary: This patch series aims to improve the hibernation process by walking per-superpageblock free lists in mark_free_pages, ensuring that only necessary pages are saved during hibernation. The existing list_for_each_entry() walk over zone->free_area[order].free_list[t] is wrapped in an SPB iteration loop, and when the zone has no SPBs (e.g., unpopulated hotplug zone), it falls back to the zone-level free list.
